scripts.firefox: rm -drf extension-dist/js  && cp browser-specific/firefox/manifest-firefox-v3.json extension-dist/manifest.json && cp browser-specific/firefox/background.html extension-dist/background.html && cp browser-specific/firefox/passkey-intercept-main.js extension-dist/passkey-intercept-main.js
scripts.chrome: rm -drf extension-dist/js && rm -f extension-dist/background.html && cp browser-specific/chrome/manifest-chrome-v3.json extension-dist/manifest.json
